keyEvents.text: Goal!  Nicaragua 1, Montserrat 0. Jaime Moreno (Nicaragua) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Josué Quijano with a cross.
Goal!  Nicaragua 1, Montserrat 1. Brandon Barzey (Montserrat) right footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal.
Own Goal by Donervon Daniels, Montserrat.  Nicaragua 2, Montserrat 1.
Lenni Cirino (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Jacob Montes replaces Junior Arteaga.
Goal!  Nicaragua 3, Montserrat 1. Jacob Montes (Nicaragua) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Harold Medina.
Substitution, Montserrat. Dominic Richmond replaces Jamie Allen.
Substitution, Montserrat. Jernade Meade replaces Lenni Cirino.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Justing Cano replaces Óscar Acevedo.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Nextaly Rodríguez replaces Juan Barrera.
Substitution, Montserrat. Mylan Benjamin replaces Brandon Barzey because of an injury.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Henry Niño replaces Kevin Serapio.
Kaleem Simon (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Nicaragua 4, Montserrat 1. Harold Medina (Nicaragua) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bancy Hernández.
Substitution, Montserrat. Josiah Dyer replaces Lyle Taylor.
